locator.quote: is on the opposite side — either env priors that REMOVE bad

text: Lesson for next experiment: the leverage is on the opposite side — env priors that REMOVE bad decisions (E3-style), the only intervention that scaled cleanly.

locator.quote: and selector-side changes are off the menu unless we find a

text: Naked-loss reward shaping and selector-side changes are off the menu unless a mechanism is found that doesn't sacrifice mean for variance.
